proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_functor = x1.dst_functor and x1.src_functor = x0.dst_functor and nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1)) = is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](forward, backward)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_functor = x1.dst_functor and x1.src_functor = x0.dst_functor and nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1)) = is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](forward, backward)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_functor = x1.dst_functor and x1.src_functor = x0.dst_functor and nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1)) = is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](forward, backward)

goal: nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O2, M2](forward, backward) = forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](forward.src_functor.dst_cat, forward.component(x0), backward.component(x0)) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2]) { forall(x2: T0) { is_iso_pair[T1, T2](x0.src_functor.dst_cat, x0.component(x2), x1.component(x2)) } = nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T3, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[O1, O2, M2, M1](forward, backward)
(forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](forward.src_functor.dst_cat, forward.component(x0), backward.component(x0)) } = nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O2, M2](forward, backward))
(forall(x1: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](forward.src_functor.dst_cat, forward.component(x1), backward.component(x1)) } = true)
function(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](forward.src_functor.dst_cat, forward.component(x0), backward.component(x0)) }(x)

goal: identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component = identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)
identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(x) = identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, x)
identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, x) = f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, x)

goal: nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, n) = forall(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](n.src_functor.dst_cat, n.component(x0), n.component(x0)) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2]) { forall(x2: T0) { is_iso_pair[T1, T2](x0.src_functor.dst_cat, x0.component(x2), x1.component(x2)) } = nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T3, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[O1, O2, M2, M1](n, n)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T3, T1, T2]) { forall(x2: T0) { is_iso_pair[T1, T2](x0.src_functor.dst_cat, x0.component(x2), x1.component(x2)) } = nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T3, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[O1, O2, M2, M1](identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f), identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f))

let w0: O1 satisfy { not is_iso_pair[O2, M2](identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).src_functor.dst_cat, identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(w0), identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(w0)) }

function(x0: O1) { is_iso_pair[O2, M2](identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).src_functor.dst_cat, identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(x0), identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(x0)) }(w0)

goal: is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, n) = (n.src_functor = n.dst_functor and n.dst_functor = n.src_functor and nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, n))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_functor = x1.dst_functor and x1.src_functor = x0.dst_functor and nat_iso_components_inverse[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1)) = is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, n)
